sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if level completed and tail alignment
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Level completed?", last_action_result.get('level_completed', False))

print("\nGreen objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")

print("\nAgent position:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 16:
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
